Questions.Title: What did the sun see when he peeked at the earth?

Questions.Title: Why did the sun decide to go on a holiday?

Questions.Option: A) a. Because he was tired | B) b. To teach people a lesson about caring for the earth | C) c. Because he didn't like earth anymore | D) d. Because he wanted to play with the stars
Questions.Answer: b. To teach people a lesson about caring for the earth

Questions.Title: What happened to the earth when the sun went on a holiday?

Questions.Option: A) a. It became brighter than ever | B) b. It was full of darkness | C) c. It started raining heavily | D) d. None of the above
Questions.Answer: b. It was full of darkness

Questions.Option: A) a. Waste water and paper | B) b. Be unkind to animals | C) c. Take care of the environment | D) d. None of the above
Questions.Answer: c. Take care of the environment

Questions.Title: Write five sentences on playtime with your friends.
Questions.Answer: 1. I play with my friends every day in the evening at 7.30 p.m. 2. We are six friends and we play hide and seek, or frisbee, or kho-kho and also seven stones. 3. Sometimes we also play indoor games like ludo, carrom, snakes and ladders and chinese chequer. 4. We play till 9 p.m. and then we go back to our homes. 5. I enjoy my playtime with my friends very much.

Questions.Title: 1. The cat called the mouse. 2. The granddaughter called the dog. 3. The farmer tried to pull the turnip but could not. 4. All of them pulled the turnip out. 5. The farmer called his wife. 6. The farmer’s wife called her granddaughter. 7. The dog called the cat.
Questions.Header: Put the sentences in story order, numbering them from 1 to 7.
Questions.Answer: 1. The farmer tried to pull the turnip but could not. 2. The farmer called his wife. 3. The farmer's wife called her granddaughter. 4. The granddaughter called the dog. 5. The dog called the cat. 6. The cat called the mouse. 7. All of them pulled the turnip out.

Questions.Title: Was it the mouse who helped to pull the turnip? Why or why not?

Questions.Title: Who all helped the grandfather to pull out the turnip?

Questions.Answer: The grandfather's wife, the girl, the dog, the cat and the little mouse helped him to pull out the turnip.
